source_pr.title: executor: migrate test-infra to testify for explain_test
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: Weizhen Wang <wangweizhen@pingcap.com>

<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #28578

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: checkMemoryInfo(t, tk, "explain analyze select * from t order by v") (executor/explain_test.go)
failure_signature: checkMemoryInfo(t, tk, "explain analyze select * from t order by v") (executor/explain_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: This PR is a test-infra migration: it rewrites `executor/explain_test.go` from gocheck to standard `testing` with `testify/require`, and updates testkit usage accordingly. The change is about improving/standardizing the test harness rather than a specific deterministic-ordering fix, so it is classified as `test_infra_migration`.
fix_pattern: Migrate gocheck-based tests to `testing` + `testify/require`, and use the updated testkit APIs (`CreateMockStore`, `NewTestKit`, `SetSession`, etc.) to standardize the test harness.

evidence: evidence: checkMemoryInfo(t, tk, "explain analyze select * from t order by v") (executor/explain_test.go)
